description_cn:
将相等的垂直载荷应用于网格的所有顶点。

对网格的所有顶点施加正负作用力。强度为负数时，为沿Z轴向下的力；正数时则为向上的力。
description_en:
Apply equal vertical loads to all vertices of the mesh.

Apply positive and negative forces to all vertices of the mesh. A negative force is a downward force along the Z-axis, while a positive force is an upward force.
author: Kangaroo Team
